Our Restaurant

An unparalleled dining experience on Block Island.

Executive Chef Francis Cavanagh leads our kitchen with ever-changing menus featuring the very best the island and its purveyors have to offer — local seafood, herbs and vegetables fresh from the Inn's raised-bed gardens, and an award-winning wine list of unique varietals and rare vintages.

Relax on the veranda. Take in the sunset. Stay late.

Reserve a Table
Small Plates at Golden Hour
A Board to Share
Cheers on the Lawn
Tables on the Lawn
The Kitchen

Chef Francis Cavanagh.

Chef Cavanagh leads our kitchen with menus that shift with what the island and its purveyors have on hand — quietly inventive, deeply seasonal, and always grounded in place.

The result is a uniquely Block Island dining experience: local seafood, garden-fresh herbs and vegetables, and creative combinations complimented by the Inn's award-winning wine list.

View the Menus
Fresh from the island
